name: Peanut
description: Peanut gives Fusion Health Juice Bar's Peanut Punch and energy shakes a rich, satisfying flavor with plant-based protein and classic Jamaican-inspired comfort.
benefits: Contains nutrients that support everyday energy

name: Aloe Vera
description: Aloe vera is a hydrating plant ingredient traditionally used in wellness routines and refreshing drinks.
benefits: Traditionally used in refreshing wellness drinks

name: Spinach
description: Spinach is a leafy green used in Fusion Health juices and smoothies for its mild flavor and nutrient density.
benefits: Contains nutrients that support everyday wellness

name: Celery
description: Celery is a crisp, hydrating ingredient commonly used in green juices and wellness blends.
benefits: Traditionally used in clean, refreshing blends

name: Parsley
description: Parsley is a bright herb used in select green juices for its fresh flavor and micronutrient profile.

name: Kale
description: Kale is a nutrient-dense leafy green commonly used in juices and smoothies at Fusion Health Juice Bar.
benefits: Contains vitamins A, C, and K

name: Ashwagandha
description: Ashwagandha is an adaptogenic herb traditionally used in wellness practices for balance and everyday routines.

name: Cucumber
description: Cucumber brings a clean, cooling flavor to green juices and helps create a refreshing, hydrating blend.

name: Cayenne Pepper
description: Cayenne pepper is a warming spice traditionally used in wellness shots and bold juice blends.
benefits: Traditionally used in warming wellness drinks
Adds bold flavor to juice shots

name: Moringa
description: Moringa is a plant ingredient traditionally valued for its antioxidant content and broad nutrient profile.

name: Maca
description: Maca is a root ingredient traditionally associated with energy, stamina, and everyday wellbeing.

name: Chia Seeds
description: Chia seeds are small seeds often added to bowls and smoothies for fiber, texture, and plant-based omega-3s.
benefits: Popular in filling smoothies and bowls

name: Pumpkin Seeds
description: Pumpkin seeds add plant-based protein, minerals, and a hearty flavor to smoothies and bowls.

name: Flaxseeds
description: Flaxseeds are fiber-rich seeds used in select wellness blends, shakes, and acai bowls.

name: Turmeric
description: Turmeric is a golden root traditionally used in wellness drinks for its warm flavor and antioxidant profile.
benefits: Adds warm flavor to juices and shots

name: Bee Pollen
description: Bee pollen is a nutrient-containing add-in traditionally associated with wellness routines.

name: Ginseng
description: Ginseng is a root traditionally used in wellness practices for energy, focus, and everyday balance.

name: Sea Moss
description: Sea moss is a mineral-rich sea vegetable used in Fusion Health energy shakes and wellness add-ins.

name: Ginger
description: Ginger brings bright, warming flavor to fresh juices, green juices, wellness shots, and Jamaican-inspired drinks at Fusion Health Juice Bar.
benefits: Popular in green juices and shots
